weaknesses: Experience exceeds listed 0-2 year preferred range

improvement_bullets: Collaborated on predictive modeling tasks and machine learning initiatives, utilizing Python and SQL to clean data and evaluate model performance for business-critical projects.
Leveraged hands-on SQL proficiency to design normalized data models, ensuring high-quality, query-ready structures for downstream analytical applications.
Authored detailed technical documentation and data-driven narratives for diverse audiences, demonstrating clear communication of complex machine learning trends and analytical findings.
Authorized to work in the United States, bringing a strong foundation in early-career data analysis and technical research to the Jobright team.
Conducted exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical testing on large-scale datasets to extract actionable insights, directly informing product iteration and strategy.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst (New York) opportunity with Jobright.ai. I am interested in this opportunity because I am passionate about the intersection of data-driven insights and AI product development. What interests me about working for Jobright.ai is its innovative approach to revolutionizing career navigation through AI agents, which intrigues me because of my background in translating raw data into impactful, automated workflows. I believe my proficiency in Python-based data analysis and my experience in cross-functional stakeholder communication would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing scalability and actionable storytelling. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed time-series models and automated client onboarding, which directly contributed to a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at Jobright.ai would allow me to bring my hands-on SQL and data modeling skills to optimize how your AI agents are tuned and evaluated. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my machine learning and technical documentation skills. I collaborated with product and UI/UX teams to reconcile complex insurance datasets, resulting in a 30% improvement in data accuracy and 25% faster project delivery. I am excited by the opportunity to use my statistical analysis expertise in working on the continuous improvement of AI systems at Jobright.ai. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to data-driven decision-making align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
